title: Griffith Observatory
reason: This art deco landmark features a high-tech planetarium, public telescopes & city views.

title: The Getty Villa
reason: Former tycoon's residence modeled after 1st-century Italian villa, with Greek & Roman artifacts.

title: Fox Plaza
reason: Its most famous appearance was in the 1988 action film Die Hard, it portrayed Nakatomi Plaza.

title: In-N-Out Burger
reason: Iconic Southern California burger joint perfect for spotting planes landing at LAX.
